steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=6x+5$. When $x=5$, replace $x$ with $5$: $$f(5)=6(5)+5.$$

steps.title: Evaluate
steps.content: $6(5)=30$, and $30+5=35$. Therefore, the value of $f(x)$ when $x=5$ is 35.

steps.title: Check the meaning
steps.content: The question asks for the output of the function at $x=5$, not the value of $x$. The output is $35$.
